title: Replace Invocation tuple alias with named struct
description: Why: pub type Invocation = (String, serde_json::Value, String) forces .0/.1/.2 tuple access throughout the codebase (jmap.rs, client.rs, methods/). A named struct with method/args/call_id fields is idiomatic Rust and self-documenting. What: Define an Invocation struct with named fields, update all construction and destructuring sites, update the test that asserts JSON array serialization.
